jobs.description: At Bessemer, we believe the future is built by creators, curators, community leaders, and co-owners. As commerce and communities transform on and off line, new distribution channels are emerging and our world is changing how we all connect, shop, and play. jobs.description: Cybersecurity is finally taking its rightful place at the center stage of the global business and geopolitical landscape. jobs.title: Is there a membership fee for Greylock X?
jobs.description: No, it is by invitation-only and membership to this fellowship is completely free. Do I need to intern with one of Greylock's portfolio companies to be approved for Greylock X? No, this is a standalone fellowship for entrepreneurial students who want to found a company now, or in the future. Will I be required to bring Greylock on as an investor when I start a company?
